zh.lifeSummary: 當Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg於1612年出生在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格時，她的父親Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh24歲，母親Brita Persdotter22歲。她於1630年與Sven Gunnarsson在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1692年5月7日在美國賓夕法尼亞州德拉沃迪尼庫姆 易曼德享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg于1612年出生在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格时，她的父亲Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh24岁，母亲Brita Persdotter22岁。她于1630年与Sven Gunnarsson在瑞典達拉納斯卡拉波格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1692年5月7日在美国宾夕法尼亚州德拉沃迪尼庫姆 易曼德享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matteson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire and Northumberland): variant of   Mattison   1. This form of the name is rare in Britain and Ireland.
Americanized form of Swedish Mattesson: patronymic from the personal name Mattes, an equivalent of Matthew . The surname Mattesson is very rare in Sweden.
Variant of   Mattison   3, a surname of Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, or North German origin, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Mattison
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the personal name Mattie (see at Mattey ) + -son. Compare Mathieson , Matson , Matthewson and Maddison .

Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Mattisson: patronymic from the personal name Mattis, an equivalent of Matthew . This is also an Americanized form of some Danish, Norwegian, and North German cognates, most commonly Mathiesen and Matthiesen , and possibly also of the very rare Danish Mattissen. Compare Matteson .

nameMeanings.name: Jestenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Dutch: habitational name from any of several places so named, for example in Lower Saxony and Mecklenburg.

variants.name: Westenberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz, Gerda.
German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Westenberg  .

historicEvents.description: Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.
Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.
King Charles II barred Jews from settling in Stockholm.

en.lifeSummary: When Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg was born in 1612, in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Sweden, her father, Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh, was 24 and her mother, Brita Persdotter, was 22. She married Sven Gunnarsson in 1630, in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 May 1692, in Tinicum Island, Delaware, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg est née en 1612, à Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suède, son père, Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Brita Persdotter, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sven Gunnarsson en 1630, à Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 mai 1692, à Tinicum Island, Delaware, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg 1612 in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh 24 und ihre Mutter Brita Persdotter 22. Sie hat 1630 in Skaraborg, Dalarna, Schweden Sven Gunnarsson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Mai 1692 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tinicum Island, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg è nata il nel 1612 nel Skaraborg, Dalarna, Svezia, sua padre, Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Brita Persdotter, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sven Gunnarsson nel 1630, nel Skaraborg, Dalarna, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 maggio 1692, nel Tinicum Island, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Briggetta Matteson Jestenbergが1612年にスウェーデンダラーナスカラボルグで生まれた時，父Cornelius Nils Jestenburghは24歳，母Brita Persdotterは22歳であった。1630年にスウェーデンダラーナスカラボルグでSven Gunnarssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1692年5月7日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州デラワーティニクウム イスランドで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg(이)가 1612년 스웨덴 다라른아 스카라볼그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Brita Persdotter(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1630년 스웨덴 다라른아 스카라볼그에서 Sven Gunnarsson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1692년 5월 7일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 데로르 틴이c 이슬랜드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sven Gunnarsson em 1630, em Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Briggetta Matteson Jestenberg родилась в 1612 г. в местности скараборг, даларна, Швеция, её отцу по имени Cornelius Nils Jestenburgh было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Brita Persdotter, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sven Gunnarsson в 1630 г. в местности скараборг, даларна, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 мая 1692 г. в местности тиникум исланд, делавар, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con Sven Gunnarsson en 1630, en Skaraborg, Dalarna, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de mayo de 1692, en Tinicum Island, Delaware, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años.
